name: Hearty Italian Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Transfer 1 1/2 cups white kidney beans to a medium bowl; mash the beans until smooth using a potato masher or fork.
2. In a large pot with a total capacity of 5 quarts, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add ham, celery, carrot pieces, onion piece, and zucchini. Cook until the vegetables are tender and begin to brown for about 15 minutes.
3. Stir in stewed tomatoes, chicken broth, chopped spinach, mashed white beans, and 2 cups water into the pot. Use a spoon to break up any large tomato pieces and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes to blend flavors. Stir in the remaining beans until heated through.
4. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and serve.
